images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese idol, embodying a lonely urban vibe amidst a tropical waterfall, her flawless skin texture glowing under vibrant neon sign lighting that bathes the scene in a strict monochrome red color grade. She wears a sleek, form-fitting silk slip dress that clings to her curves, the thin straps slipping off her shoulder to reveal delicate collarbones. Leaning casually against a vibrant yellow surfboard, she looks directly into the camera with a skeptical raised eyebrow, her large expressive eyes hinting at seductive distrust. The background is a dreamy bokeh of rushing water and lush jungle foliage illuminated by the red glow. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
